task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the taxpayer's documents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window open to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\thompson\ or a document viewer showing the tax documents for Rev. Marcus Thompson.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the StudioTax 2024 application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The StudioTax 2024 application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the taxpayer's name into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Marcus Thompson' is visible in the personal information section or taxpayer profile within the StudioTax interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent is actively filling out the tax return forms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Data being entered into tax forms (such as income slips, deductions, or clergy residence deduction forms) within the StudioTax 2024 application.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent is saving the file to the correct directory with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box showing the file name 'marcus_thompson.24t' and the destination folder C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

task_completion.description: Verify the completed return was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The StudioTax title bar displays 'marcus_thompson.24t' or a file explorer window shows the file 'marcus_thompson.24t' present in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the StudioTax GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the StudioTax 2024 graphical interface rather than using terminal commands or scripts to generate the .24t file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually entered data into the tax software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show step-by-step navigation and data entry within StudioTax, not just opening the software and immediately saving a blank or pre-made file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't bypass the software to create a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing commands like 'touch marcus_thompson.24t' or python scripts creating an empty file in the target directory.
